settings.title: Settings
settings.notificationsSubtitle: Care reminders plus updates about items, hats, shopping for your capybara, achievements, and more
settings.rateSubtitle: Leave a review on the App Store
settings.shareSubtitle: Send the app link to a friend
settings.shareMessage: Check out Capyrescue – care for your capybara!
settings.resetProgressSubtitle: Start over with a fresh capybara, stats, and coins
settings.resetProgressConfirmMessage: This restores the app to a new-player state (onboarding and walkthrough will show again). Your subscription stays active if you have one.
legal.versionNotice:
App versions before 1.12 may display Google AdMob ads and may process related ad data. From version 1.12 onward, Google AdMob ads and ad tracking are removed.

From version 1.14 onward: local notifications may include care reminders, gameplay reminders (such as a daily mini-game), and updates or reminders about in-app features such as items, accessories (for example hats), shopping for your capybara, achievements, and similar. These are scheduled only on your device; we do not send remote push from our own servers for those alerts. During the optional first-time tutorial, food, drink, or happiness may be lowered from 100 to 99 if needed so you can complete all tutorial steps.
onboarding.languageSubtitle: The app will use this language. You can change it later in Settings.
onboarding.welcomeTitle: Thank you for rescuing a capybara!
onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: What would you like to call your capybara?
onboarding.notificationsSubtitle: Enable notifications for feeding and care reminders, and for updates about items, hats, shopping for your capybara, achievements, and more.
onboarding.pledgeTitle: I pledge to take care of my capybara
onboarding.paywallSubline: Try Pro free for 7 days — cancel anytime
onboarding.paywallDisclaimer: No charge during trial. Cancel anytime in Settings.
onboarding.paywallOfferSummary: 7-day free trial, then %@/year. Billed annually. Cancel anytime.
onboarding.paywallPaymentTerms:
Payment will be charged to your Apple Account at confirmation of purchase.

Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.

Cancel anytime in App Store settings. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period.
tutorial.messageStats: Keep above 80. If all reach 0, your capybara runs away.
tutorial.messageItemsAndShop: Unlock items with coins. Get more coins in Get More.
tutorial.messageFood:
This is the food circle.

• Keep food above 80.
• Feed your capybara to increase food.
• Max food is 100.
• Food drops 1 point per hour.
tutorial.messageDrink:
This is the drink circle.

• Keep drink above 80.
• Give your capybara drinks to increase drink.
• Max drink is 100.
• Drink drops 1 point per hour.
tutorial.messageHappy:
This is the happiness circle.

• Keep happiness above 80.
• Pet your capybara to increase happiness.
• Max happiness is 100.
• Happiness drops 1 point per hour.
tutorial.messageStatsWarning:
These are your capybara's stat circles.

⚠️ If all stats reach 0, your capybara will run away!
tutorial.messageItems:
This is the Items button.

Your capybara might like to have some accessories. You can buy them using coins in the Items menu.
tutorial.messageShop:
This is the Get More button.

You can get more coins from here.
tutorial.messageAchievements: Earn coins by caring. Tap the medal for the full list.
promo.bunnyEarsBannerFormat: Don't you think %@ looks good? Buy them some Bunny Ears below.

tutorial.walkthroughHappyMessage: Tap your capybara to pet them and boost happiness.
tutorial.walkthroughItemsMessagePart1: Take a look at Items—you can unlock hats and accessories with coins. To get more coins, tap %@.
